response:
Progress Report, Part II  
This report highlights the visual enhancements implemented during the game's redevelopment. Although we have successfully nearly doubled the frame rate through optimization improvements, the integration of new hardware-intensive features, such as dynamic fluid particles and physics-based hair strands, introduces performance challenges. We will work to maintain a balance between these advancements.  

Picture #1 illustrates the new belly bulge system. In the updated game, each character has a specific stomach capacity that determines how much "body fluid" they can absorb through their womb, stomach, and bowels. For example, Dr. Anya can take in 4000ml of sperm without overflowing, whereas Alet can only accommodate 2800ml. Male test subjects release a different amount of liquid during climax: a Dreamer expels approximately 10-15ml, while an Elder Thing delivers 400-600ml into their partner.  

Picture #2 and #3 showcase the new cum and love juice graphics. The fluid effects are not pre-programmed in sexual scenes and instead activate dynamically based on the character's sensitivity, ecstasy levels, and stamina. Certain character abilities, obtained through testing with specific test subjects, may increase the likelihood of urinary incontinence or excessive squirting.  

Picture #4 and #5 depict dynamic body interactions and skin decals in VR, where hands move through a VR controller.  

Pictures #6, #7, and #8 present previews of upcoming bondage devices and cooperative sexual scenarios. More details will be released in the upcoming month.  

The May Monthly Poll and returning costume bundle will be available in a few hours.
